subject: A massive horned demon or archfiend bearing a skull-mask headdress, rendered in flat graphic linework against a red-orange infernal background
description: A towering demonic figure dominates the frame in a near-symmetrical frontal composition. The figure wears or bears an enormous skull-shaped headdress or mask with prominent curving horns and a wide gaping maw of teeth. The body below is massive and broad-shouldered with clawed or taloned hands visible near the lower frame. The artwork uses flat, high-contrast linework in a graphic illustration style with a warm red-orange and gold palette throughout, suggesting an infernal or desert-hell setting. A tall staff or weapon element is visible at the far right edge. The background is textured with repeated flame-like or organic forms.
foreground: massive horned demonic figure with skull-mask headdress, clawed hands visible, frontal stance
background: red-orange infernal texture, flame-like organic forms
